title: CoreItems
description: Custom Items, YAML-Driven, In-Game GUI, Clickable Actions – Lightweight & Extensible - A useful plugin for defining and managing custom in-game items.
body:
![Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/vBCZ9Ljg/05301-ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif)
![MainImage](https://i.postimg.cc/gj9GrcX3/Core-Items-854-x-700-px.png)

**Features!**
- Define custom items entirely via a single YAML file per namespace
- Organize items into namespaces for clean grouping and modular sharing
- Assign unique item keys referenced as <namespace>:<item_key>
- Support custom model data linking to resource-pack textures
- Configure display name, lore, amount, unbreakable state, and glow effect
- Add vanilla enchantments and item flags (e.g., HIDE_ATTRIBUTES)
- Bind left- and right-click actions to console commands with placeholders
- Set per-item and global interaction cooldowns to prevent spamming
- Built-in GUI menu lets players browse namespaces and grab items in-game
- Pagination and configurable border items ensure a clean GUI layout
- Enable a namespace search feature with a timeout and custom search button
- Reload all configs on-the-fly via /coreitems reload without restarting
- List all registered custom items with /coreitems list
- Grant fine-grained command permissions: give, list, menu, and reload
- Lightweight design optimized for minimal TPS and memory impact
